    simp only [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', Matrix.of_apply, wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    simp [h_ne, h]

              = wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    exact Measure.map_eval_pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩
  rw [h_proj]
  simp only [wignerMeasureDist]
  simp [h_ne]
